headline: Airbnb expands into hotels, cars, groceries
summary: Airbnb, facing tighter local regulations on short-term home rentals, announced Wednesday it is adding boutique hotels, car rentals and grocery delivery to its app in a bid to transform itself into a one-stop travel shop.The updated app adds grocery delivery through Instacart in more than 25 US cities, as well as airport and train station transfers and luggage storage services in more than 160 cities worldwide.

headline: Q1 2026 U.S. Retail Scorecard - Update May 20, 2026
summary: To date, 143 of the 188 companies in our Retail/Restaurant Index have reported their EPS results for Q1 2026. Blended earnings growth estimate stands at 25.6%. Read more here.

headline: Expedia Group announces agreement to acquire CarTrawler, advancing strategy to build the most complete B2B travel platform
summary: SEATTLE, May 20, 2026--Expedia Group today announced that it has entered into an agreement to acquire CarTrawler, an Ireland-based B2B platform powering car rental, ground transport and Insurtech solutions for the global travel industry.

headline: Expedia Group B2B Introduces AI Toolkit and Platform for the Future of Travel Distribution
summary: LAS VEGAS, May 20, 2026--Expedia Group B2B today announced a new set of AI-powered products and partnerships that make it easier for companies in any sector to build travel into their customer experiences.

headline: Expedia To Acquire Irish Car Rental, Ground Transport And Insurance Solutions Provider CarTrawler; Financial Terms Not Disclosed
summary: CarTrawler's platform brings exceptional depth, breadth and expertise across these areas, connecting 550+ car rental suppliers and 500+ mobility suppliers to more than 300 leading travel brands around the world,
